inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $10031.0M less capital spending $179.0M ÷ 427.0M diluted shares per ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence uses reported free cash flow; stock-based compensation is already a non-cash add-back in cash from operations.

bear.notes: Generative-AI competition slows net new Creative Cloud seats; multiple compresses

base.notes: Subscription RPO supports mid-single-digit visibility; Firefly embedded in Creative Cloud

bull.notes: AI monetization lifts ARPU; Experience Cloud share gains; sustained buybacks

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light software; equity securities marked at fair value (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: RPO $22.52B modeled via subscription growth; Firefly option separate milestone band

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Generative AI integrated into Creative Cloud and Document Cloud

growth_explanation.mechanism: Subscription RPO converts to revenue; Creative Cloud seat and ARPU growth plus Experience Cloud enterprise expansion; capital returns via buybacks.

falsifiers.trigger: RPO growth falls below revenue growth for two consecutive quarters
Management cites competitive seat churn from generative-AI alternatives

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Five additive components map Digital Media engine, Digital Experience engine, Firefly AI option, net financial claims, and AI competition reserve once each.

components.label: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner-cash engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm: FY2025 revenue $23769.0M, Digital Media $17650.0M, Digital Experience $5860.0M, OCF $10031.0M, FCF $9852.0M, RPO $22520.0M, cash $5431.0M, debt $6210.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 free cash flow (OCF less capex)

source.locator: Net cash from operating activities $10031.0M less capital spending $179.0M

assumptions.label: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner cash per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: Revenue-weighted allocation of consolidated FY2025 free cash flow to Digital Media; Publishing segment cash embedded in residual.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple on Digital Media
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses generative-AI seat churn; base mid-cycle subscription path; bull credits Firefly ARPU lift without peak-cycle heroics.

inputs.label: FY2025 consolidated free cash flow per diluted share

assumptions.label: Digital Experience owner cash per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: Revenue-weighted allocation of consolidated FY2025 free cash flow to Experience Cloud.

assumptions.label: Owner-cash capitalization multiple on Digital Experience

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm: FY2025 revenue $23769.0M, Digital Media $17650.0M, Digital Experience $5860.0M, OCF $10031.0M, FCF $9852.0M, RPO $22520.0M, cash $5431.0M, debt $6210.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Generative-AI credit monetization and ARPU lift over 3 to 7 years; Firefly embedded in Creative Cloud since September 2023.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 RPO $22.5B and subscription mix; Adobe does not disclose standalone Firefly revenue.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental generative-AI model training and inference spend embedded in consolidated R&D and cost of revenue; base reserves ~$850M incremental burden.

source.locator: RPO $22,520M at November 28, 2025; 65% recognized within 12 months

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Firefly and generative-AI monetization beyond base segment cash
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping incremental AI credit and ARPU uplift not fully captured in segment capitalization multiples; base is judgment band.

calculations.label: Firefly AI monetization option per share

assumptions.label: Generative-AI competition, SBC dilution, and multiple-compression reserve

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADBE, including Digital Media and Document Cloud owner cash, Digital Experience engine, Firefly AI monetization option, net financial claims, and AI competition reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 427.0M per ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm; inputs.shares_millions in valuation.json.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Segment engines value revenue-weighted owner cash once; Firefly option is a separate milestone band; net financial claims and AI reserve use unique overlap keys. Consolidated free cash flow is not double-counted across segments.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for subscription software compounder.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner-cash engine
Generative-AI competition and stock-based compensation reserve
Net cash and debt claims on common equity

source_lineage.locator: Net cash from operating activities $10031.0M less capital spending $179.0M
RPO $22,520M at November 28, 2025; 65% recognized within 12 months

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Joel Greenblatt
top_dissents.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
pricing_analysis.implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 25x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
pricing_analysis.strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
falsifiers: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
pricing_analysis.pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADBE, including Digital Media and Document Cloud owner cash, Digital Experience engine, Firefly AI monetization option, net financial claims, and AI competition reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 427.0M per ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm; inputs.shares_millions in valuation.json.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Segment engines value revenue-weighted owner cash once; Firefly option is a separate milestone band; net financial claims and AI reserve use unique overlap keys. Consolidated free cash flow is not double-counted across segments.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for subscription software compounder.
